use_cases: Display subscription pricing tiers with visual hierarchy
Highlight featured or recommended pricing plan
Provide interactive CTA buttons for plan selection
Show feature comparisons across pricing tiers
Encourage user conversion with animated hover effects
ai_summary: A sophisticated pricing card component with dark theme aesthetics, glass-morphism effects, and gradient accents. Features interactive hover states with glow effects and multiple pricing tier display options. Includes variant-based button components for CTAs. Designed for SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms requiring premium pricing presentation with conversion-focused interactions.
